title: caryopteris incana
intro: Caryopteris incana, also known as blue mist shrub or bluebeard, is a perennial shrub native to China, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Caryopteris incana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
